name: Wawel Royal Castle — The Most Precious route
description: Curated route through selected exhibition spaces: Castle 1st floor, Castle 2nd floor, Castle Underground, Crown Treasury, and Armoury. Wawel Royal Castle's curators picked rooms and objects from the collection. Guided tour, ~110 min visiting time.
notes: Booking date considered: 2026-06-04 · Start of attraction: 10:00. Guided tours in English are available only at certain hours — note the flag displayed next to each time slot and select the correct one.

items.name: Spaces
items.description: Castle 1st floor · Castle 2nd floor · Castle Underground · Crown Treasury · Armoury

items.name: Guide
items.description: Guided tour in English at flagged time slots

items.name: Age restriction
items.description: Not available to children under seven years old

items.name: Meeting point
items.description: Lost Wawel exhibition — the first part of the Castle Underground combined route

items.name: Reduced ticket required for free-admission groups
items.description: Persons with statutory rights to individual free admission to the Castle's exhibitions must purchase a reduced ticket for special routes / guided exhibitions / events (workshops).

items.name: Staircases & narrow passages
items.description: Route leads through numerous staircases and narrow passages — not recommended for people with movement difficulties; wheelchair access is not possible.
